name: options-skill-pack
description: Local options trading skills for this project

plugins.name: bull-put-spread-selector
plugins.description: Identifies the optimal strikes for a bull put spread (sell put + buy put) for a given stock.

plugins.name: bull-put-spread-monitor
plugins.description: Monitors bull put spread positions and classifies health into SAFE/WATCH/WARNING/DANGER/ACT NOW zones.

plugins.name: iron-condor-selector
plugins.description: Identifies the optimal strikes for an iron condor (sell put + buy put + sell call + buy call) for a given stock.

plugins.name: iron-condor-monitor
plugins.description: Monitors iron condor positions and classifies health into SAFE/WATCH/WARNING/DANGER/ACT NOW zones.

plugins.name: spread-roller
plugins.description: Finds roll targets for bull put spreads and iron condors — shows close cost, calendar and diagonal roll candidates ranked by net credit.

plugins.name: covered-call-selector
plugins.description: Identifies the optimal call strike to sell for a covered call on a given stock.

plugins.name: covered-call-monitor
plugins.description: Monitors covered call positions and classifies health into SAFE/WATCH/WARNING/DANGER/ACT NOW zones.

plugins.name: cash-secured-put-selector
plugins.description: Identifies the optimal put strike to sell for a cash-secured put on a given stock.

plugins.name: cash-secured-put-monitor
plugins.description: Monitors cash-secured put positions and classifies health into SAFE/WATCH/WARNING/DANGER/ACT NOW zones.
